---
name: Spec clarification
about: The spec is ambiguous, contradictory, or unclear.
title: "[spec-clarification] <short description>"
labels: ["spec-clarification"]
---

## Where in the spec

- Part / file: `spec/XX-name.md`
- Section: §X.Y
- Paragraph or line: <quote or line number>

## What is unclear

_Describe the ambiguity. Quote the exact text. If two paragraphs contradict, quote both._

## How an implementer could interpret it wrongly

_Give at least one concrete misreading an implementer could arrive at, and why it would produce broken interop._

## Your suggested resolution

_Optional. If you have a specific wording fix in mind, include it. If the resolution requires a normative change, this should become a MIP instead._

## Have you checked

- [ ] The relevant section of the [glossary](../../docs/glossary.md).
- [ ] The [FAQ](../../docs/faq.md).
- [ ] Open and merged [MIPs](../../mips/).
- [ ] Existing open issues in this label.
